name: Butterscotch Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugars and shortening until smooth.
2. Blend in the eggs, vanilla, and milk.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture all at once, mixing until smooth.
5. Fold in the oats.
6. Drop by teaspoonful onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until set.
